title: Can a Viewer interact with a Button on a board?
excerpt: Is it possible for viewers to interact with a button programmed to notify board creator?

posts.author: MsGreene (Dominique Greene)
posts.cookedHtml: Is it possible for viewers to interact with a button programmed to notify board creator?

posts.author: MCautreels (Maarten Cautreels - Tryve)
posts.cookedHtml:
Unfortunately they can’t as clicking a button counts as making a change to the column/item.

When you would setup Column Level permissions and make the button column view only for certain users, they won’t be able to click it either. It would show a bubble telling them the column is view only:

Best,

Maarten

posts.author: MsGreene (Dominique Greene)
posts.cookedHtml: Thank you so much @MCautreels for responding to my question this is great information to know!!!
